final:
// // This module implements an asynchronous 8-bit unsigned subtractor with reset functionality.
module top_module(
    input signed [15:0] a,
    input signed [15:0] b,
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg signed [15:0] sum
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
        sum <= 0;
    end else begin
        sum <= a + b;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements an asynchronous 8-bit unsigned subtractor with reset functionality.
